title: Korak 4

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Shopping List</title>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/react/18.3.1/umd/react.development.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/react-dom/18.3.1/umd/react-dom.development.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/babel-standalone/7.26.5/babel.min.js"></script>
    <script
      data-plugins="transform-modules-umd"
      type="text/babel"
      data-presets="react"
      data-type="module"
      src="index.jsx"
    ></script>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./styles.css" />
  </head>
  <body>
    <main id="app-container"></main>
    <script
      data-plugins="transform-modules-umd"
      type="text/babel"
      data-presets="react"
      data-type="module"
    >
      import { ShoppingList } from "./index.jsx";
      const appContainer = document.getElementById("app-container");
      const root = ReactDOM.createRoot(appContainer);
      root.render(<ShoppingList />);
    </script>
  </body>
</html>

challengeFiles.name: styles
index

tests.text: Red vaših podataka za items mora imati sekvencijalni niz znakova Apples, Bananas, Strawberries, Blueberries, Mangoes, Pineapple, Lettuce, Broccoli, Paper Towels, i Dish Soap.

description:
Sada, nakon što imamo osnovnu programsku strukturu, došlo je vreme za dodavanje elemenata i funkcionalnosti pretrage.

Kreiraj red podataka i postavi njegovu vrednost u parametar nazvan items. Unutar reda podataka, dodaj niz znakova Apples, Bananas, Strawberries, Blueberries, Mangoes, Pineapple, Lettuce, Broccoli, Paper Towels, i Dish Soap. Ovo će biti lista stavki koje će se prikazati u aplikaciji.
